程序包 org.apache.dubbo.rpc.cluster.support

  • 类概要 
    类 说明
    AbstractClusterInvoker<T>
    AbstractClusterInvoker
    AvailableCluster
    AvailableCluster
    AvailableClusterInvoker<T>
    AvailableCluster
    BroadcastCluster
    BroadcastCluster
    BroadcastCluster2
    BroadcastCluster
    BroadcastCluster2Invoker<T>
    BroadcastCluster2Invoker sed for collecting all service provider results when in broadcast2 mode
    BroadcastClusterInvoker<T>
    BroadcastClusterInvoker
    BroadcastResult
    BroadcastResult
    ClusterUtils
    ClusterUtils
    FailbackCluster
    FailbackClusterInvoker
    FailbackClusterInvoker<T>
    When fails, record failure requests and schedule for retry on a regular interval.
    FailfastCluster
    FailfastClusterInvoker
    FailfastClusterInvoker<T>
    Execute exactly once, which means this policy will throw an exception immediately in case of an invocation error.
    FailoverCluster
    FailoverClusterInvoker
    FailoverClusterInvoker<T>
    When invoke fails, log the initial error and retry other invokers (retry n times, which means at most n different invokers will be invoked) Note that retry causes latency.
    FailsafeCluster
    FailsafeClusterInvoker
    FailsafeClusterInvoker<T>
    When invoke fails, log the error message and ignore this error by returning an empty Result.
    ForkingCluster
    ForkingClusterInvoker
    ForkingClusterInvoker<T>
    NOTICE!
    MergeableCluster  
    MergeableClusterInvoker<T>
